title: Melty Crumbly Irish Cheese Casserole
description: A spicy and crumbly Irish dish featuring cheese slices, perfect for a weeknight dinner, low-sodium-friendly
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the diced onion and bell pepper until tender.
Add the poached chicken breast, spicy mustard, and salt-free seasoning blend to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the crushed whole wheat crackers and chopped fresh parsley.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the cracker mixture in the bottom of the dish.
Layer the chicken and vegetable mixture on top of the crackers.
Arrange the Kerrygold Irish cheese slices on top of the chicken mixture.
Top the cheese with the remaining cracker mixture.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the crackers are golden brown.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
